title: Mailchimp vs ActiveCampaign (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Mailchimp and ActiveCampaign: pricing, features, automation, and CRM capabilities to find the best email marketing tool for your business.
intro: Mailchimp and ActiveCampaign are two popular email marketing platforms with different strengths and target audiences. Mailchimp offers an accessible free tier and beginner-friendly interface, while ActiveCampaign combines advanced automation with integrated CRM features. This comparison will help you determine which platform best fits your business needs and budget.

comparison_table.tool_a: Freemium (free up to 500 contacts, paid from $13/month)

comparison_table.tool_b: Full-featured CRM with lead scoring and tracking

choose_a_if: You're a beginner or small business looking for an affordable or free email marketing solution
You want a user-friendly drag-and-drop editor with straightforward automation features
You need to build landing pages and want analytics combined with email marketing
choose_b_if: You require advanced automation workflows and sophisticated lead scoring capabilities
You need an integrated CRM system alongside your email marketing platform
You're willing to invest in a paid solution for more comprehensive features like SMS and site tracking

faq.a: Neither is universally 'better'—it depends on your needs. Mailchimp excels for beginners and small businesses due to its free tier and simplicity, earning a lower Trustpilot rating (1.5) but strong G2 score (4.3). ActiveCampaign is better for businesses needing advanced automation and CRM, with superior customer satisfaction ratings (4.1 Trustpilot, 4.5 G2) but no free option.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Mailchimp or ActiveCampaign?
faq.a: Mailchimp is cheaper overall, offering a completely free tier for up to 500 contacts and starting paid plans at $13/month. ActiveCampaign has no free tier and starts at $15/month. For cost-conscious startups, Mailchimp is the clear winner.

faq.q: Can I switch from ActiveCampaign to Mailchimp?
faq.a: Yes, you can export your contacts and data from ActiveCampaign and import them into Mailchimp. However, some advanced automation workflows and CRM data may not transfer perfectly. Most users can successfully migrate their email lists and basic campaign data between the two platforms.
